en_body:
A fragrant current flows sweetness of perfume
Like a river to the sea when child comes into life
White delicious milk sweetens the child's heart
A mother's embracing arms warm and tender wait...

Nurturing you since before your forming
Waiting for you since books first came into your hands
Trusting you will weave Beauty from the heart
Raising you from mother into a Human Being, my child..!!

Be gracious and gentle with friend and foe
Live in Truth, beneath the bright witness of Earth and Sky
Wherever your body journeys, be Human
To live is Morality, beloved by every soul.

Earth and Sky nourish all beings
Warmth and coolness, sun and wind cradle the Sacred source of Life
Mother and Father continue Heaven's Will in you
You are the seed of holy Blessedness..!!

Cradling you within my own flesh and skin
Feeding you by heartbeat, by crimson blood
Loving you through all the human world
Nurturing you with gratitude and fidelity among dear friends
Revering you as Phù-Đổng Thiên-Vương
Hoping you will reap the Harvest of the REPUBLIC OF VIET-NAM..!!
note: Phù-Đổng Thiên-Vương is the divine child-hero Thánh Gióng, and the final harvest invokes the lost Republic of Vietnam.
